series_metadata.series_description: Licensee credential file. Series contains initial applications and supporting documents and transcripts for chiropractic, acupuncture and preceptorship. May also contain service requests, renewal applications, CE audit documents, reinstatement/restoration applications and supporting documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until death of licensee then transfer initial photograph and application with SSN redacted to State Archives. Destroy all remaining documents. ; Paper: Retain until uploaded into electronic system then destroy. If not uploaded, retain until death of licensee then transfer initial photograph and application with SSN redacted to State Archives. Destroy all remaining documents., Electronic: Archives ; Paper: Archives
